description: MCP server that exposes the Lenderprice platform's capabilities to AI models.
name: com.lenderprice/mcp

headers.description: Optional. Recommended: OAuth 2.1. Omit this header and your MCP client will discover /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource and run the browser-based authorization flow against the server's pre-registered static client. Dynamic Client Registration is not supported.
headers.name: Authorization

title: Lenderprice MCP
